title: Fix x-assign unique when index out-of-range of an unpacked struct array
body:
verilator version: >= 5.012 （include the newest version Verilator 5.015 devel rev v5.014-31-g63db60f64） 
(I didn't test the lower version)

bug code:
```verilog
typedef struct {
    logic a;
} Data_t;

module tb (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst
);
    localparam int SIZE = 20;
    reg[$clog2(SIZE)-1 : 0] ptr;
    Data_t buffer[SIZE];
    reg out;

    always_ff @( posedge clk ) begin
        int i;
        if (rst) begin
            for (i=0;i<SIZE;i=i+1) begin
                buffer[i].a <= 0;
            end
        end
        else begin
            ptr <= (ptr == (SIZE - 1)) ? 0 : (ptr+1);
            out <= buffer[ptr].a;
        end
    end

endmodule
```


with verialtor arguments :
```
--x-assign unique --x-initial unique
```
if SIZE = 32, compile success
but if is 20 or others not a power of 2, compile error
message:
```
Vtb_tb__DepSet_h66f4ffa7__0.cpp:129:33: error: operands to ‘?:’ have different types ‘Vtb_Data_t__struct__0’ and ‘IData’ {aka ‘unsigned int’}
  128 |         vlSelf->__Vdly__out = ((0x13U >= (IData)(vlSelf->__PVT__ptr))
      |                                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  129 |                                 ? vlSelf->__PVT__buffer
      |                                 ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  130 |                                [vlSelf->__PVT__ptr]
      |                                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  131 |                                 : (IData)(vlSelf->__Vxrand_h9c26aeca__0))
```
generated c++ code is:
```c++
        vlSelf->__Vdly__out = ((0x13U >= (IData)(vlSelf->__PVT__ptr))
                                ? vlSelf->__PVT__buffer
                               [vlSelf->__PVT__ptr]
                                : (IData)(vlSelf->__Vxrand_h9c26aeca__0))
            .__PVT__a;
```
__Vxrand_h9c26aeca__0 is a unsiged instead of struct

if without verilator arguments
then another error message
```
Vtb___024root__DepSet_h00dcc3fb__0.cpp:188:39: error: no match for ‘operator&’ (operand types are ‘bool’ and ‘Vtb_Data_t__struct__0’)
  188 |                                       & vlSelf->tb__DOT__buffer
```

when ptr may go out of the array range
it will generated the
"out = (ptr <= (SZIE-1) ? buffer[ptr] : random_value).a"
c++ code (random_value is a unsigned type)
or
"out = ((ptr <= (SZIE-1) & buffer[ptr]).a" (without verilator arguments)
I think it should be
"out = (ptr <= (SZIE-1) ? buffer[ptr].a : random_value)"
